name: WebClsPlnCustDmLoadRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT MAX(LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN) UPDATE P SET P.CDM_LOAD_IN='Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC P JOIN cte ON P.RUN_CYC_NO=cte.RUN_CYC_NO WHERE P.SRC_SYS_CD='FACETS' AND P.SUBJ_CD='MBR CARD' AND P.TRGT_SYS_CD='IDS'

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2009 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


DESCRIPTION:   Pulls data from ClsPlnCustSvcIdCardPhn for  loading Max run cycle into the Data Mart

PROCESSING:

Annotations:
Job Name;
WebClsPlnCustDmLoadRunCycUpd_EE
Read all the Data from IDS P_RUN_CYC Table; 
Pull records based on ExtractRunCycle
Set CDM_LOAD_IN to Y for SUBJ_CD = 'MBR CARD' and TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS'
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the Web Data Mart for each of the run cycles processed.
